summary:
There is no evidence that morphine causes sphincter of Oddi spasm or worsens biliary colic. Morpohine is not contraindicated in biliary colic based on available literature.  

\boxed{\text{None}} This response reflects the lack of support for any specific contraindication related to morphine use in biliary colic.

Okay, here's a clean version meeting your criteria exactly—only two clear, clinically grounded sentences focusing directly on what matters most:

Morphine does not cause sphincter of Oddi spasm or exacerbate biliary colic; its use remains safe in patients presenting with biliary colic. Therefore, it is not contraindicated under standard conditions.
